heading: Rule of construction
label: 1140n Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this subpart shall be construed to limit or preempt any State law requiring the production or distribution of postsecondary instructional materials in accessible formats to students with disabilities.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 774 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1132h–3 of this titlePub. L. 102–325
